---
title: "Awards & Recognition"
toc: false
---

Recognition received for research contributions, scientific communication, and academic merit.

---

## Research & Science Communication Awards

::: {.award-entry}
### 🏆 Outstanding Poster Award — EMS Annual Meeting 2024
**European Meteorological Society**  
📅 2024  
Awarded unanimously by the committee for the poster *"Enhancing meteorological report access and response time: How the Meteorological Service of Catalonia addresses the rise in weather-related claims"*.  
[{{< fa link >}} Award announcement](https://www.emetsoc.org/outstanding-poster-award-ems2024/)
:::

::: {.award-entry}
### 🏆 Premi de Recerca Jove
**Departament d'Economia i Coneixement, Generalitat de Catalunya**  
📅 2011  
Award for young researchers. Recognised work: *"Testing the energy of the future: Dye Solar Cells"*.
:::

::: {.award-entry}
### 🏅 Menció Honorífica de la Societat Catalana de Física
**Societat Catalana de Física**  
📅 2011  
Honourable mention for the work: *"Testing the energy of the future: Dye Solar Cells"*.
:::

::: {.award-entry}
### 🏆 Premi CIRIT
**Consell Interdepartamental de Recerca i Innovació Tecnològica, Generalitat de Catalunya**  
📅 2009  
Award promoting scientific spirit among young people. Recognised work: *"Palafrugell, un viatge pel seu clima"*.
:::

---

## Fellowships & Programmes

::: {.award-entry}
### Programa Joves i Ciència
**Fundació Catalunya — La Pedrera**  
📅 2009–2011  
Selected as a participant in this competitive programme providing young students with their first research experience. Developed a project on organic photovoltaic energy.
:::
